title: Hat Pack
description: This is a hat pack with hats
body:
### ![Hat Pack image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d4da00088739c5218c52de82e13e0524f4207c0.png)
### What the resource pack adds?

This is a set of hats that adds different variations of hats to the game. This resource pack is perfect for your game with friends or for your minecraft server. Resource pack fits perfectly into the atmosphere of minecraft. 
**You can see all renames at Gallery**
**All models are dressed on a carved pumpkin**

### Why should you use our resource pack?

Our set of resources is perfectly combined with vanilla minecraft and will add new features to role play!

### Dependencies
This resource pack requires **optifine** to work with forge. And **CIT resewn** for working with fabric
